rationale: C1 proved the narrowed MPG gate removes the prior false SELA read, but trusted C2 lifecycle ran entry-index-SELA-MPG rather than the frozen entry-index-MPG-SELA positive path. The unchanged SELA reverse handshake bypassed the modified MPG companion gate, so H2.1 failed its causal qualification and no authorized call can restore eligibility.
mission_alignment: STOP_2X_EXPLORATION is an explicitly authorized terminal outcome after a trusted H2.1 causal failure; closing preserves the frozen thresholds, single-correction boundary, and no-H3 rule.

mission_review.objective_alignment: The Mission tested the only authorized H2.1 correction and reached an evidence-backed terminal outcome without requiring a product-value choice from William.
mission_review.acceptance_gap: Positive qualification, Stable comparison, and cost benefits are not proved; they are reported as absent rather than inferred from static size or answer quality.
mission_review.task_contribution: Static qualification completed, causal qualification stopped on its first trusted failure, conditional comparison was pruned, and terminal evidence/reporting completed.
mission_review.roi_effect: Further calls have negative authorized ROI because C3 cannot prove the bypassed positive branch and any repair requires another semantic correction or architecture hypothesis.
mission_review.non_action_risk: Stopping keeps 1.4.6 as the functional baseline and preserves a reproducible rejected candidate; it causes no release, merge, installation, or publication action.
